meta.description: UI test cases for wedding invitation builder and RSVP management platform

testSuites.name: Home Page
testSuites.description: Tests for the landing page and navigation

steps.expected: Hero section with headline and CTA button is displayed

steps.action: Verify template gallery section is visible
steps.expected: 'Choose Your Perfect Template' section shows 3 template cards
Footer with navigation links is displayed

steps.action: Click 'Start Creating' button in hero section

steps.expected: Page adapts to mobile layout with hamburger menu if applicable

testSuites.name: Authentication
testSuites.description: Tests for Google OAuth login and logout flows

steps.action: Verify Google sign-in button is visible

steps.expected: User is redirected to Google OAuth consent screen

steps.action: Complete Google sign-in with valid credentials

steps.expected: User session is active and builder loads with user data

testCases.name: Login with template parameter preserves selection

steps.expected: Login page loads with template parameter
User lands on '/builder' with 'elegant-minimal' template pre-selected
Error message is displayed to user
User sees friendly error message with option to retry login

testSuites.name: Template Preview
testSuites.description: Tests for template preview page functionality

steps.action: Verify template name and description are displayed
Verify invitation preview with sample data is displayed
steps.expected: Preview shows sample couple names, dates, venue

steps.action: Verify 'Use This Template' button is visible

steps.expected: Template preview loads in desktop view
Preview switches to mobile dimensions (375px width)
Preview switches to tablet dimensions (768px width)

testCases.name: 'Use This Template' redirects to login with template param

steps.expected: 404 page or error message is displayed

testSuites.name: Invitation Builder - Basic Information
testSuites.description: Tests for editing basic invitation details

testCases.name: Builder page loads with existing or new invitation

steps.action: Verify left panel (form sections) is visible
Verify right panel (live preview) is visible
Verify Basic Information section is expanded by default
steps.expected: Partner names, date, time, venue fields are visible
Date is selected and picker closes

steps.action: Enter 'Grand Ballroom' in Venue Name field
Enter '123 Wedding Lane, New York, NY 10001' in Venue Address field
Verify preview updates with venue info
steps.expected: Preview shows venue name and address

testCases.name: Autosave triggers after 1 second of inactivity

steps.action: Make any change to a field

testSuites.name: Invitation Builder - Hero Image
testSuites.description: Tests for hero image upload functionality

steps.action: Click upload area or drag image file
steps.expected: File picker opens or drop zone highlights
Image thumbnail is displayed in form

steps.action: Navigate to '/builder' with existing hero image
Verify preview no longer shows image
Attempt to upload a non-image file (e.g., .pdf)

steps.expected: Color picker and font picker are visible

steps.action: Select a new color (e.g., #B76E79 rose gold)
Verify preview updates with new accent color
steps.expected: Preview shows new color on buttons, accents

steps.action: Verify preview updates with new fonts
steps.expected: Preview text uses new font pairing

steps.action: Enter 'Exchange of vows in the garden' as description
Navigate to '/builder' with existing schedule blocks
Click edit icon on a schedule block
Navigate to '/builder' with existing schedule blocks
Click delete icon on a schedule block
Verify preview no longer shows deleted event

testCases.name: Reorder schedule blocks via drag and drop

steps.action: Drop the block in new position

steps.expected: Notes section in preview includes 'Dress Code'

steps.action: Click edit icon on a note
Click delete icon on a note
Verify preview no longer shows deleted note

testSuites.name: Guest Management
testSuites.description: Tests for guest groups and individual guest management

steps.expected: 'Smith Family' group is visible with unique RSVP token

steps.action: Navigate to '/builder' with existing guest group
Click on 'Smith Family' group to expand
steps.expected: Group details and guest list shown

steps.action: Click edit icon on a guest
Click delete icon on a guest
Verify guest is no longer in list
Navigate to '/builder' with existing guest group
Click delete icon on guest group
steps.expected: Confirmation dialog warns about cascade delete
Group and all guests are deleted

testCases.name: View RSVP link for guest group

steps.action: Click 'Copy Link' or link icon on guest group

testCases.name: View QR code for guest group

steps.action: Click 'QR Code' icon on guest group

testSuites.name: CSV Guest Import
testSuites.description: Tests for bulk guest import via CSV

steps.action: Upload valid CSV file with columns: Group Name, Guest Name, Email, Phone
Verify import preview shows parsed data
steps.expected: Preview table shows groups and guests to be imported

steps.action: Verify new groups/guests appear in list

testCases.name: Import CSV with missing columns shows error

steps.expected: 'Missing required column: Guest Name' or similar

testSuites.name: RSVP Dashboard
testSuites.description: Tests for RSVP analytics and response tracking

steps.action: Navigate to '/builder' with guests and RSVP responses

steps.expected: Count matches total guests across all groups

steps.action: Verify columns: Guest Name, Group, Status, Meal, Plus Ones
Verify each guest's response data is correct
Navigate to '/builder' with mixed RSVP responses

steps.expected: Table shows only guests without response

testCases.name: RSVP page loads with valid token

steps.expected: Form with attendance, meal options displayed
'Your RSVP has been recorded' or similar

steps.action: Submit an RSVP as 'Attending' with meal 'Chicken'

testCases.name: RSVP page shows error for no token
RSVP page shows error for invalid token

steps.action: Set RSVP deadline to a past date via builder
Verify form is disabled or hidden

steps.expected: Text is legible, layout is mobile-friendly
Buttons and inputs are large enough to tap

testSuites.name: Live Preview
testSuites.description: Tests for the real-time invitation preview in builder

testCases.name: Preview updates in real-time on form changes

steps.expected: Preview shows new event in timeline

steps.action: Navigate to '/builder' with complete invitation data

testSuites.name: Error Handling
testSuites.description: Tests for error states and edge cases

steps.action: Make a change to trigger autosave
Attempt an action that requires auth
Navigate builder form with Tab key
Verify all form inputs have labels
Check text contrast on home page

steps.expected: Form fields are announced with labels

testCases.name: Home page loads within acceptable time

steps.action: Navigate to '/' and measure load time

steps.expected: Form fields are editable within 3 seconds

testCases.name: Autosave does not block user input

steps.action: Type continuously in a text field

coverageAreas: RSVP Link and QR Code Generation
